*->revive.guardText: reviveCount < REVIVE_BUDGET (1); 2nd failure escalates to stalled

*->stalled.guardText: reviveCount >= REVIVE_BUDGET — escalation to terminal failure sink

verify->remediate.guardText: deriveAdvancement: verify verdict == 'fail' (regression_risk >= 5 OR any severity:high finding) and remediateCycleCount < REMEDIATE_CYCLE_CAP (3)
verify->remediate.datalog: advance_to('remediate', T) :- phase_done('verify', T), verify_fail(T), cycle_count(T, C), C < 3.  verify_fail(T) :- regression_risk(T, R), R >= 5.  verify_fail(T) :- high_finding(T).

remediate->verify.guardText: deriveAdvancement: after remediate completes, advance back to verify (verify⇄remediate cycle, cap 3)

*->turn-cap.guardText: event.type === 'turn-cap-exhausted' — continuation self-loop, revive budget untouched

*->advance.guardText: deps ✓ ∧ admission — phase signal done ∨ dep-skipped, gates satisfied
*->advance.datalog: advance_to(Next, T) :- phase_done(Cur, T), next_phase(Cur, Next), admission_ok(T).
